word: G579 - ἀπόβλητος - apóblētos - ap-ob'-lay-tos - Be refused

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
thrown away, to be thrown away, rejected, despised, abominated
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G577; cast off, that is, (figuratively) such as to be rejected: - be refused.
